name: Strawberries and Romaine with Poppy Seed
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine the torn Romaine lettuce, sliced strawberries, and sliced onions in a large bowl.
2 In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, whisk together the mayonnaise (or salad dressing), sugar, vinegar, milk, and poppy seeds until well combined.
3 Just before serving, pour the dressing over the salad and toss lightly to coat.
